title: Satellite Link Simulator
description: An interactive 3D simulator of satellite communication links: Keplerian orbital mechanics, ITU-R atmospheric attenuation models, and full RF link budgets (free-space path loss, Eb/N0, Shannon capacity, Doppler) — with results validated against a published measurement study. Add LEO/MEO/GEO satellites, change the weather, and watch links close or fail in real time.
